title: Packet 040 Validated Artifact Publication Reconciliation Or Defer Decision
objective: Decide the smallest truthful next move for the now workstation-validated Packet 040 two-file source/test artifact: open a bounded publication and host-reconciliation packet or defer with the artifact preserved locally and on the host, without publishing directly from this decision packet and without reopening migration.
active_role: Olares Validated Artifact Publication Decision Operator
dependency_note: Packet 042 mirrored and validated the exact Packet 040 two-file artifact on the workstation with matching SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, passing workstation diff hygiene, app-local TypeScript, and existing no-install browser smoke, while leaving the artifact uncommitted and unpublished on both workstation and host.
required_inputs: Current parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform`, including scoped package and lockfile cleanliness

Current workstation diff scope and SHA-256 for `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/app/apparatus-resource-explorer.tsx` and `apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, exact diff scope, and Packet 040 host diff SHA-256
Current old-clone branch, commit, and status count at `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`
Packet 042 validation evidence proving the artifact is workstation-validated but unpublished
constrained_outputs: A decision handoff naming exactly one next packet: bounded publication-and-host-reconciliation or bounded defer-with-validated-artifact-preserved
A clear statement that Packet 043 itself does not publish, commit, push, or reconcile the host artifact

No source edits, no package or lockfile mutation, no dependency install, no package-manager activation/download, no runtime mutation, no service mutation, no migration approval, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no remote rewrite, no force/reset/clean, no rollback, and no old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Reconfirm the workstation diff remains limited to the two scoped Packet 040 files and still matches SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` remains on `clean-main` at `f39f8ddb3593c79333280d3aceabc9d0ceadc1c2` with the same exact two-file Packet 040 host artifact.
Reconfirm tracked package and lockfile paths remain clean and `.vercelignore` remains unrelated and untracked.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Decide exactly one next packet: bounded publication-and-host-reconciliation or bounded defer-with-validated-artifact-preserved.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source, runtime, service, package, lockfile, install, remote, AI-services, Gitea, canonical-hosting, migration, force/reset/clean, publication, reconciliation, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only decision-making and bounded authority updates.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 043 revalidated that the workstation and `/home/olares/code/apex` both still hold the exact Packet 040 two-file artifact at SHA-256 `081317eafc0649ec63f1deae479b892a39fcd2e8329f79b2416e76d959dc04d5`, confirmed tracked package and lockfile paths remain clean, confirmed `.vercelignore` remains unrelated and untracked, and confirmed `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remained untouched at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count 30. It selected bounded publication-and-host-reconciliation as the single next packet because the artifact is workstation-validated and defer would preserve unnecessary dual dirty state. Packet 043 itself did not publish, reconcile, roll back, commit, push, mutate runtime or services, mutate packages or lockfiles, install anything, approve migration, or mutate the old clone.
next_action: Open only Packet 044 bounded publication and host reconciliation for the validated Packet 040 artifact and associated authority surfaces. Do not treat Packet 043 as publication, reconciliation, migration approval, or generic Olares reopening.
